Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class OrderCreate.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.OrderCreate.Builder

OrderCreate
public static final class OrderCreate.Builder extends Object

    The type of the asset in this order, which must be one of the following: EQUITY, MUTUAL_FUND, and FIXED_INCOME.

  • Method Details

    • assetType

      public OrderCreate.Builder assetType(AssetType assetType)
      The type of the asset in this order, which must be one of the following: EQUITY, MUTUAL_FUND, and FIXED_INCOME.

    • brokerCapacity

      public OrderCreate.Builder brokerCapacity(BrokerCapacity brokerCapacity)
      Defaults to "AGENCY" if not specified. For Equities: Only "AGENCY" is allowed. For Mutual Funds: Only "AGENCY" is allowed. For Fixed Income: Either "AGENCY" or "PRINCIPAL" are allowed.

    • brokerCapacity

      public OrderCreate.Builder brokerCapacity(Optional<? extends BrokerCapacity> brokerCapacity)
      Defaults to "AGENCY" if not specified. For Equities: Only "AGENCY" is allowed. For Mutual Funds: Only "AGENCY" is allowed. For Fixed Income: Either "AGENCY" or "PRINCIPAL" are allowed.

    • clientOrderId

      public OrderCreate.Builder clientOrderId(String clientOrderId)
      User-supplied unique order ID. Cannot be more than 40 characters long.

    • clientReceivedTime

      public OrderCreate.Builder clientReceivedTime(OffsetDateTime clientReceivedTime)
      Required for Equity Orders for any client who is having Apex do CAT reporting on their behalf. A value may be provided for non-Equity orders, and will be remembered, but valid timestamps will have no impact on how they are processed.

    • clientReceivedTime

      public OrderCreate.Builder clientReceivedTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientReceivedTime)
      Required for Equity Orders for any client who is having Apex do CAT reporting on their behalf. A value may be provided for non-Equity orders, and will be remembered, but valid timestamps will have no impact on how they are processed.

    • commission

      public OrderCreate.Builder commission(CommissionCreate commission)
      A custom commission applied to an order

    • commission

      public OrderCreate.Builder commission(Optional<? extends CommissionCreate> commission)
      A custom commission applied to an order

    • currencyCode

      public OrderCreate.Builder currencyCode(String currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • currencyCode

      public OrderCreate.Builder currencyCode(Optional<String> currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • fees

      public OrderCreate.Builder fees(List<FeeCreate> fees)
      Fees that will be applied to this order. Only the BROKER_FEE type is supported.

    • fees

      public OrderCreate.Builder fees(Optional<? extends List<FeeCreate>> fees)
      Fees that will be applied to this order. Only the BROKER_FEE type is supported.

    • identifier

      public OrderCreate.Builder identifier(String identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierIssuingRegionCode

      public OrderCreate.Builder identifierIssuingRegionCode(String identifierIssuingRegionCode)
      A string attribute denoting the country of issuance or where the asset is trading. Only available for Mutual Fund orders. Defaults to US, when trading non US mutual funds this field must be provided Complies with ISO-3166 Alpha-2 Codes

    • identifierIssuingRegionCode

      public OrderCreate.Builder identifierIssuingRegionCode(Optional<String> identifierIssuingRegionCode)
      A string attribute denoting the country of issuance or where the asset is trading. Only available for Mutual Fund orders. Defaults to US, when trading non US mutual funds this field must be provided Complies with ISO-3166 Alpha-2 Codes

    • identifierType

      public OrderCreate.Builder identifierType(IdentifierType identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported For Mutual Funds: only SYMBOL and CUSIP are supported For Fixed Income: only CUSIP and ISIN are supported

    • letterOfIntent

      public OrderCreate.Builder letterOfIntent(LetterOfIntentCreate letterOfIntent)
      Letter of Intent (LOI). An LOI allows investors to receive sales charge discounts based on a commitment to buy a specified monetary amount of shares over a period of time, usually 13 months.

    • letterOfIntent

      public OrderCreate.Builder letterOfIntent(Optional<? extends LetterOfIntentCreate> letterOfIntent)
      Letter of Intent (LOI). An LOI allows investors to receive sales charge discounts based on a commitment to buy a specified monetary amount of shares over a period of time, usually 13 months.

    • limitPrice

      public OrderCreate.Builder limitPrice(LimitPriceCreate limitPrice)
      A limit price definition

    • limitPrice

      public OrderCreate.Builder limitPrice(Optional<? extends LimitPriceCreate> limitPrice)
      A limit price definition

    • maxSellQuantity

      public OrderCreate.Builder maxSellQuantity(DecimalCreate maxSellQuantity)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • maxSellQuantity

      public OrderCreate.Builder maxSellQuantity(Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> maxSellQuantity)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • notionalValue

      public OrderCreate.Builder notionalValue(DecimalCreate notionalValue)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • notionalValue

      public OrderCreate.Builder notionalValue(Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> notionalValue)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • orderDate

      public OrderCreate.Builder orderDate(DateCreate orderDate)
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

    • orderType

      public OrderCreate.Builder orderType(OrderType orderType)
      The execution type of this order. For Equities: MARKET, and LIMIT are supported. For Mutual Funds: only MARKET is supported. For Fixed Income: only LIMIT is supported.

    • quantity

      public OrderCreate.Builder quantity(DecimalCreate quantity)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • quantity

      public OrderCreate.Builder quantity(Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> quantity)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • rightsOfAccumulation

      public OrderCreate.Builder rightsOfAccumulation(RightsOfAccumulationCreate rightsOfAccumulation)
      Rights of Accumulation (ROA). An ROA allows an investor to aggregate their own fund shares with the holdings of certain related parties toward achieving the investment thresholds at which sales charge discounts become available.

    • rightsOfAccumulation

      public OrderCreate.Builder rightsOfAccumulation(Optional<? extends RightsOfAccumulationCreate> rightsOfAccumulation)
      Rights of Accumulation (ROA). An ROA allows an investor to aggregate their own fund shares with the holdings of certain related parties toward achieving the investment thresholds at which sales charge discounts become available.

    • side

      public OrderCreate.Builder side(Side side)
      The side of this order.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public OrderCreate.Builder specialReportingInstructions(List<SpecialReportingInstructions> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public OrderCreate.Builder specialReportingInstructions(Optional<? extends List<SpecialReportingInstructions>> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • stopPrice

      public OrderCreate.Builder stopPrice(StopPriceCreate stopPrice)
      A stop price definition

    • stopPrice

      public OrderCreate.Builder stopPrice(Optional<? extends StopPriceCreate> stopPrice)
      A stop price definition

    • timeInForce

      public OrderCreate.Builder timeInForce(TimeInForce timeInForce)
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

    • tradingSession

      public OrderCreate.Builder tradingSession(TradingSession tradingSession)
      Which TradingSession to trade in, defaults to 'CORE'. Only available for Equity orders.

    • tradingSession

      public OrderCreate.Builder tradingSession(Optional<? extends TradingSession> tradingSession)
      Which TradingSession to trade in, defaults to 'CORE'. Only available for Equity orders.

    • build

      public OrderCreate build()
